The iter-100 hypothesis that `funext j'` would dissolve this class is FALSE — discrimination tree fails identically post-funext at the morphism-composition level. STREAK ESCALATION CRITERION TRIGGERED — 3rd consecutive prover lane on this sorry without closure.

attempts.insight: **CRITICAL FINDING**: in-place `set` is also INSUFFICIENT for this blocker class. The Pi.lift's anonymous-closure codomain cannot be hidden behind a name without rewriting the full inferred type. Iter-100's E2 (top-level refactor with named-codomain `T : ∀ j, Z₁ (h j) ⟶ Z₂ j`) remains as the durable escape, but requires a refactor lane.

Alternative: try the E3 `LinearMap.ext`-route from the task_result (iter-099 prover suggestion) — lift the goal to `∀ z, ... z = ... z`, then unfold Pi.lift at the value level via `Pi.lift_apply`. The E1 (body-local helper) and in-place E2 (`set`) routes are now confirmed dead per attempts 7 and 8 above.
